conversation_history.content: I have an apartment complex 10 units I need cameras Just had a break in

I hear you, Test3 — a break-in is a serious wake-up call, and a 10-unit apartment complex is exactly the kind of property we protect. Just to confirm, is this a commercial/investment property you own or manage — not your personal residence?
Yes I own it

Perfect — that makes total sense, and after a break-in, getting real protection in place fast is exactly the right move. With a 10-unit multi-family property, what's the main thing driving you right now — theft prevention, liability coverage, or insurance requirements?
I just told you break-ins

You're right, my bad — theft prevention it is, and a recent break-in puts this at the top of the priority list. Our system is built to stop the next one before it happens, not just record it. Are you looking for a proactive service that actually intervenes in real time, or were you thinking more of a recording-only setup?
I need to stop before it happens

That's exactly what our system is built for — proactive intervention, not just footage after the fact. Our AI monitors live and our team can verbally challenge an intruder the moment they step on your property. How large is the complex — and do you have multiple entry points or just one main access?
10 units and I just have one main interest

Got it — one main entry point on a 10-unit complex is actually very manageable to lock down tight. What's the property address? I'll pull up a satellite view and map out exactly where your cameras should go before our call.
387-80 orchard view place Palmdale California 93550

Perfect — I've got 38780 Orchard View Place, Palmdale, CA 93550 locked in. I'll have a satellite layout ready before our call. Do you currently have any cameras or security system in place, or are we starting from scratch?
I have cameras but need upgrades
Good news — we can work with what you have and upgrade where it counts. When are you looking to get this done — do you have a timeline in mind?
Now

Love the urgency — that's exactly the right mindset after a break-in. To recommend the right setup for your property, which investment range fits your project best? Reply with a number:

1 = $10k–$30k
2 = $30k–$60k
3 = $60k+
4 = Not sure yet

Perfect — $10k-$30k is a solid range for a 10-unit complex with one entry point. Last question — are you the decision-maker for this project, or is there someone else who would need to be part of this conversation?
Yes I am
You're all set, Test3 — one more quick one: how did you hear about AV Surveillance?
FB

Facebook — logged it, appreciate that! Test3, based on everything you've shared, you're exactly who our system is built for — recent break-in, 10 units, ready to move now. I'd love to get you set up with a quick 20-minute demo so we can map out the right camera layout for your property. I'm sending you our booking link now: https://link.avsurveillance.com/widget/bookings/avsurveillance/demo — do you have time this week or next?

conversation_history.content: Good afternoon. I'm able to access my phone now . Can you remind me of the app and I'll dl

Hi Harold, great to hear from you! To access your system, you'll want to download the **Eagle Eye Networks** app — available on both iOS and Android. Search 'Eagle Eye Networks' in your app store and log in with your existing credentials. If you run into any trouble logging in, let me know and I'll get someone from our support team to assist you right away!
Hi I'm available when you're able to walk me through activating my app as well as the system keeps going down . If you can give me a call I also have approval for an estimate you submitted Thanks

Hi Harold, great to hear from you! I'll make sure someone from our team reaches out to walk you through the app and looks into the system going down — that's definitely something we want to get sorted for you right away. I'll also flag the estimate approval so we can get that moving. What's the best time to give you a call today?
Good morning. I have the app set up . Please let me know when we can talk for the next steps thank you

Good morning Harold! Glad the app is up and running — that's a great first step. I'll let the team know you're ready and have someone reach out to you shortly to walk through next steps and discuss that estimate. Is there a time today that works best for a quick call?
Around 1
Perfect — 1 PM it is, Harold! Someone from our team will give you a call then to walk through the next steps and go over that approved estimate. Talk soon!
Thank you
You're welcome, Harold! We'll talk at 1 — looking forward to it. 😊
undefined

I'm available just missed your call if you can call me back

AI2hod
Hi Harold! No worries at all — I'll let the team know you're available now and have someone call you back right away!

answers.N/A: Repeated spam/solicitation from Prime Mark Registry - FINAL NOTICE message

conversation_history.content: Hello, this is the Legal Department from Prime Mark Registry. A third party has contacted our firm to trademark AV Surveillance. However, public records indicate you are already using this business name in commerce, which may give you prior legal rights to the name. To protect the name from being registered by another party, text/call at (551) 363-2906. You can visit our website at primemarkregistry.com

Hey there — this looks like it may have come through to the wrong channel. We're AV Surveillance, a commercial security monitoring company, and this appears to be a solicitation unrelated to our services. If you're a business owner concerned about protecting your property, we'd love to chat — but we're not able to assist with trademark inquiries here.

FINAL NOTICE: The third party has requested to federally trademark the same name. If you wish to discuss your potential rights or pursue federal trademark protection before we proceed with the third-party filing, please call or text us immediately at (551) 363-2906. If we do not hear from you, we will assume you do not wish to move forward and will proceed accordingly. Visit primemarkregistry.com for more information.

This appears to be an unsolicited trademark solicitation — not a genuine legal notice from our company's actual legal counsel. We won't be engaging with this contact. If you're a business owner looking to protect your commercial property with proactive 24/7 surveillance, we're happy to help — otherwise, we're unable to assist here.

answers.context: Existing customer approving estimate — adding cameras and repairing two existing units at manufactured housing community. Billing questions: credit card timing and ACH options.

conversation_history.content: Hi. We are happy to add a credit card for this estimate. Will this be charged immediately or after the work has been completed. Also is ACH payment an option? Thx

Hi Noshin! Great question — billing and payment details are handled directly by our team during the proposal stage, so I want to make sure I get you connected with the right person. Before I do, I just need to confirm a couple of quick things about your project. Is this for a commercial or business property, or a residential project?
Business Property

Perfect — business properties are exactly what we specialize in. What type of property are we securing — construction site, warehouse, cannabis, auto dealership, multi-family apartments, retail plaza, or something else?
Manufactured housing community

Manufactured housing communities are a great fit for what we do — lots of ground to cover and multiple entry points to manage. What's the main reason you're exploring surveillance right now — theft prevention, liability, or insurance requirements?
AV already installed a system. We are adding additional cameras and repairing two existing ones.

Got it, Noshin — thanks for that context! Since you're already an AV Surveillance customer, let me make sure the right team member gets your message. You're looking to add additional cameras and repair two existing ones at your manufactured housing community — I'll flag this for our service team right away. Is there anything else you'd like to add so we can get you taken care of quickly?
We will move forward with what is in the current estimate.

That's great news, Noshin — I'll pass that along to our service team right away! To confirm, you're approving the current estimate for the additional cameras and the two repairs at your manufactured housing community. Someone from our team will be in touch shortly to confirm next steps and address your billing questions about credit card timing and ACH options. Is there anything else you'd like us to note?
Great. Thx
You're all set, Noshin — thanks for confirming! We'll get everything moving on our end. Have a great day! 😊
